name: Pumpkin-Pie Spice
recipeInstructions:
1. Add 1 tablespoon of pumpkin-pie spice mixture to the pumpkin pie filling.
2. Stir in 1 teaspoon into 2 cups of applesauce.
3. Stir in 1 teaspoon into 2 cups of softened vanilla ice cream or frozen yogurt. Serve over warm fruit pies or gingerbread.
While preparing, consider using these spices in a decorative jar as a gift. Attach a few recipe suggestions with a ribbon. Makes about half a cup.
